summary: Iteration 2 testing: Backend 100% pass (9/9 pytest incl. real Resend email sent). Frontend has multiple deviations from the review spec — missing/renamed data-testids, hero text does not match spec, FeaturedProjects grid is not sticky-stacked and lacks 3rd Practo item, theme class naming inverted, and success toast text differs from spec. Contact form does POST and backend returns email_sent:true.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid='contact-resume-download' — code has 'contact-resumes' instead (links to Drive URL, not resume PDF)
Missing data-testid='featured-projects-section' on the section wrapper (currently rendered inside Projects section without an outer testid)
Hero heading shows profile.name ('Abhishek Banaj.') instead of massive gradient text 'HI, I'M ABHISHEK' per spec. No .hero-heading class in use.
Success toast text is 'Message sent! Abhishek will get back to you soon.' — spec required 'Message sent — email delivered to Abhishek!' when email_sent:true

Cards render in a plain 2-col grid; not sticky-stacking as spec requires. Also spec expected 3 cards incl. 'Practo Growth Analytics', but API returns only 2 (hiremory + nl-analytics). Either add Practo Growth Analytics to FEATURED_PROJECTS in server.py or render an additional static card in the section.

Theme class naming is inverted. Default localStorage theme='light' but the visual is dark. When html.light present -> dark UI shown; html.dark present -> light UI shown. Spec expects html.light == LIGHT mode with purple/magenta hero gradient. Fix either the useTheme mapping or the CSS overrides in index.css so class names match visual modes.

integration_issues.issue: Backend correctly returns {ok:true, email_sent:true} and Resend delivers email. Frontend toast fires but text does not match spec.

issues: Default landing is visually dark but the DOM class says 'light' — confusing for downstream style overrides and inconsistent with spec's naming convention

action_items: Rename data-testid 'contact-resumes' → 'contact-resume-download' and point href to profile.resume_url (PDF), not resume_drive_url
Add data-testid='featured-projects-section' to the FeaturedProjects wrapper section
Update hero heading to display 'HI, I\'M ABHISHEK' with .hero-heading gradient class (silvery in dark, purple/magenta in light)
Change success toast text to 'Message sent — email delivered to Abhishek!' when response.email_sent is true
Implement sticky-stacking layout for featured project cards and add 'Practo Growth Analytics' as a 3rd featured card (either in backend FEATURED_PROJECTS or as static frontend card)

Fix theme class naming inversion: either flip the class assignment in useTheme (App.js line 33-34) so html.light = light UI, html.dark = dark UI, OR flip the CSS overrides in /app/frontend/src/index.css. Also set default theme to 'dark' since dark is the intended default.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is 700 lines — should be split into per-section files (Hero, Contact, FeaturedProjects, Projects, etc.)
Duplicate useTheme hook in both App.js and primitives.jsx — remove one and import from a single source
server.py: PROFILE dict mutates at import time from env vars — fine, but Practo Growth Analytics not in FEATURED_PROJECTS despite being referenced in spec
Contact endpoint stores document then updates email_sent inside try — good fail-soft; but doc.email_id may be None on failure; consider filtering None fields before insert
seed_data_creation: 1 real Resend email sent to abhishekbanaj01@gmail.com from test 'TEST_Automated Tester' + 1 mongo contact_messages doc inserted from playwright test (name='TEST Playwright')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully validated with pytest (backend_test.py). Frontend has 6 spec deviations — most are simple testid/text changes; theme inversion + hero text + FeaturedProjects restructure are the larger items. After main agent fixes, re-run playwright to verify testids & toast text; backend pytest can be re-run as regression.
rca of the issue: Multiple frontend features described in the review request were partially implemented: testids used different names than spec (contact-resumes vs contact-resume-download), FeaturedProjects section lacks a wrapper testid, hero heading uses profile.name instead of hard-coded 'HI, I'M ABHISHEK' gradient text, and CSS class → theme mapping is inverted. Backend Resend integration is fully functional — email was successfully delivered via resend.Emails.send with configured API key.
